summary: Studio Portal Frontend Testing Complete. All 9 features tested successfully - Login, Dashboard, Projects List, Project Detail, Updates, Assets, Account, Request Access, and Navigation. Backend login API verified working. All portal pages load correctly with proper data-testids.

tests_passed: Login page loads with data-testid='studio-login-page' - PASS
Login form has email input (data-testid='login-email-input') - PASS
Login form has password input (data-testid='login-password-input') - PASS
Login form has submit button (data-testid='login-submit-btn') - PASS
Login with test credentials redirects to Dashboard - PASS
Dashboard shows user name and role badge - PASS
Dashboard shows projects grid with 6 projects - PASS
Projects page loads with search and project cards - PASS
Project Detail page loads with poster, overview, documents sections - PASS
Project Detail has Financial Overview for investor role - PASS
Updates page loads with empty state - PASS
Assets page loads with filter buttons and watermark notice - PASS
Account page shows profile info and password change form - PASS
Request Access page has all form fields and role dropdown - PASS
Navigation between all portal pages works via sidebar - PASS

features: Sign In button with loading state
Click to navigate to project detail

Filter buttons (All Types, Pitch Decks, Scripts, E-Books, Images, Videos, Documents)

seed_data_creation: Test user already existed in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Studio Portal frontend fully tested. All 9 features working: Login (/studio-access/login), Dashboard (/studio-access), Projects List (/studio-access/projects), Project Detail (/studio-access/projects/{slug}), Updates (/studio-access/updates), Assets (/studio-access/assets), Account (/studio-access/account), Request Access (/request-access), and full navigation. Test user investor@test.com/TestPassword123 has investor role with access to all projects. Backend APIs not tested per request.
